description: Canonical hook inventory. Renderers translate each record into the host's native format. Events use snake_case (pre_tool_use, post_tool_use, pre_commit, post_edit, session_start, stop). A record in 'shared' applies to every host listed in its 'targets' array; host-specific arrays carry hooks that only make sense on one host.

shared.description: Universal pre-tool guardrail. Blocks destructive invocations such as --no-verify, force-push-to-main, and wildcard home deletion. Opt out per-session with AGENT_FORGE_GUARDIAN=off.
